name: Hitman 1 WSO | Prez
description:
Piss off, you yuppie

Art by @Heartbreak_Juan

Late as usual with my posts ik, since its Thursday and this was meant to be posted last Sunday. BUUUUT I have a good reason, that reason being i didn't feel like working on it and felt like doing something else, also I still get home late as shit so I just spend that time fooling around.

The scenario is you're Monarch, and Prez approachs you being buddy buddy as usual. I wanted to add atleast 2 more intros before release but I figure better late than never I guess. Monarch POV since you can just add whatever personality to want to the guy (or gal, I don't judge) since we know jack about Monarchs personality. I'm adding more scenario this weekend most likely. Also I know prez never said dude in the game, but I don't care.

I thought about putting the switch tag before I remembered I could do whatever I wanted. Idk if you guys care about this, but my controller broke down again and I have to order a new one, from ebay more specifically cause new ones are overpriced and im not made of money, also my boots soles are worn out and my calluses are getting huge, take this info as you will since I felt like mentioning it.

Project wingman blah blah blah ace combat
creator: Luftwaffle67
